title: Syrian Pastry Stuffed Flatbread
description: A delicious and easy-to-make flatbread stuffed with a mixture of mindfully prepared ingredients, perfect for a quick dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: Mindfully prepared mix of herbs (parsley, oregano, thyme)

instructions: Lay out the flatbread pieces and evenly spread a tablespoon of the herb mix on each.
Sprinkle 1/2 tablespoon of flaky pastry crumbs on each piece of flatbread.
Top with a quarter cup of feta cheese crumbles.
Place the flatbread on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roll out the Syrian pastry and cut into 4-6 squares.
Place a piece of flatbread on each square and fold the pastry to seal the edges.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown.
